creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
There was a regression in bsd.python.mk [1] that was recently fixed [2] that may be related, and I note that audio/py-pylast doesn't use AUTOPLIST, which is the condition under which the regression was reproducible. 

If you haven't already, can you reproduce the issue after this revision and report back.

[1] http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-python/2014-July/007263.html
[2] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=362364

Assigning to maintainer
